title: Rat Extermination in Kensington, Brooklyn | $350-$600 | Best Pest Control NYC
metaDescription: Professional rat extermination services in Kensington, Brooklyn. Licensed exterminators serving homes and businesses near Ocean Parkway. Same-day service available. Call now!
intro: Kensington's mix of pre-war apartment buildings, attached row houses, and local businesses along Church Avenue and Coney Island Avenue creates numerous entry points for rats seeking shelter and food. Our licensed rat extermination specialists provide comprehensive rodent control services throughout this diverse Brooklyn neighborhood, from the residential blocks near Prospect Park Southwest to the commercial corridors along Ditmas Avenue.
whyUs: Best Pest Control NYC has served Kensington residents and business owners for years with proven rat elimination methods tailored to the neighborhood's unique building stock. Our technicians understand the structural vulnerabilities common in Kensington's older homes and multi-family dwellings, and we provide effective, long-lasting solutions with follow-up inspections to ensure complete eradication.
localContext: Kensington's proximity to Prospect Park, busy commercial districts, and aging infrastructure makes it particularly susceptible to rat infestations, especially in buildings along the F and G subway lines. The neighborhood's mix of private homes with yards, basement apartments, and street-level retail spaces requires experienced exterminators who understand how rats navigate between properties in this densely populated area.

faqs.question: How much does rat extermination cost in Kensington?
faqs.answer: Rat extermination in Kensington typically costs between $350 and $600, depending on the size of your property, the severity of the infestation, and whether you need ongoing prevention services. We provide free inspections and detailed quotes before beginning any work.

faqs.question: Why are rats so common in Kensington, Brooklyn?
faqs.answer: Kensington's older building stock, proximity to Prospect Park, busy commercial corridors with restaurants, and subway access provide ideal conditions for rats. The neighborhood's mix of residential and commercial properties with basements, crawl spaces, and shared walls makes it easy for rats to travel between buildings undetected.

faqs.question: How quickly can you respond to a rat problem in Kensington?
faqs.answer: We offer same-day and next-day service for rat extermination in Kensington. Our team understands that rats pose health risks and cause property damage, so we prioritize rapid response times throughout the neighborhood, from Ocean Parkway to the border with Midwood.

faqs.question: What does your rat extermination service include?
faqs.answer: Our comprehensive rat extermination service includes a thorough inspection to identify entry points and nesting areas, strategic placement of traps and bait stations, exclusion work to seal access points, removal of dead rodents, sanitation recommendations, and follow-up visits to ensure the infestation is completely eliminated and prevent future problems.
